message:
fix(doctor): detect MCP tool-level isError responses and rename default seed agents

- RpcClient: add parsed_tool_error() check that inspects result.isError
  in JSON-RPC responses, returning a DoctorError instead of silently
  treating tool-level failures as success
- call_tool_once: wire the new check after the existing RPC-error guard
- Rename default seed demo agents from InspectorRed/InspectorBlue to
  CrimsonHarbor/AzureMeadow to avoid confusion with actual inspector
  tool names
- Add test coverage for the new tool-error detection path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -258,8 +258,8 @@ impl ResolvedCaptureConfig {
             seed_demo: false,
             seed_timeout: 30,
             seed_project: "/tmp/tui_inspector_demo_project".to_string(),
-            seed_agent_a: "InspectorRed".to_string(),
-            seed_agent_b: "InspectorBlue".to_string(),
+            seed_agent_a: "CrimsonHarbor".to_string(),
+            seed_agent_b: "AzureMeadow".to_string(),
             seed_messages: 6,
             seed_delay: "1".to_string(),
             seed_required: false,
